reviews.review_description: Why does it say 200 some dollars is that normal then i see it actually said 300 some why?

Just a heads up you have to pay to play each level, there Is only 1 level that is free.  I didn’t see anywhere saying that each level you had to pay to unlock. 3 stars because it’s a cool idea and I feel bad leaving anything less. Cool idea though, hopefully there will be more VR firefighting games in the future, especially multiplayer firefighting games.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for taking the time to review our app and for sharing your feedback. We genuinely appreciate your input, and it's invaluable for us as we continue to improve our services.

We apologize for any confusion regarding the pricing structure of our app. While our app details do mention the availability of in-app purchases, we understand that it might not have been clear that each level requires a separate purchase. We'll definitely take your feedback into consideration and work on making this aspect more transparent for our users.

We're thrilled to hear that you found the Fire Extinguisher level valuable, as it serves both as a public education tool and a preview of our VR training approach. Additionally, please note that we offer free evaluation periods of all our levels to Fire Departments and other organizations as part of our commitment to providing accessible training solutions.

Once again, thank you for your review and for supporting our app.  We're continuously exploring ways to expand and enhance our offerings, and your input will certainly be taken into account as we plan for the future.

reviews.review_description: This is a fantastic app! It teaches the correct method and then lets you practice. It reminds me of the fire extinguisher training I had at work, but it’s easier and more fun in VR!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your positive review! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the app and finding the training both fun and effective. It's great to know that the experience reminds you of the fire extinguisher training you had at work, but with the added benefit of being easier and more enjoyable in VR. Our goal is to make learning practical skills engaging and accessible, and your feedback affirms that we're on the right track. We appreciate your support and are motivated to keep improving and expanding our training programs. Happy training, and stay safe!

reviews.review_description: The level I’m able to play seems great. I’d love to continue using other levels, but I don’t see a price for each level listed anywhere at all. When I go through the app, it wants me to input all of my payment details before I can see the price. I’m sure I’d be willing to pay for each level if I could see the price, honestly! Just on the off chance that each level is $60, I refuse to put my payment info in. Does anybody know the pricing?

developer_response.body:
We appreciate your interest in our programs! We understand your hesitation about entering payment details before seeing the pricing. Let us be transparent about our pricing structure:
Each individual module is priced at $299 USD. We currently offer special bundle deals where you can get 3 modules for the price of 1. For detailed pricing and current bundle offers, please visit our webpage.
We agree that prices should be more visible upfront in the app, and we appreciate your feedback. If you have any other questions about specific modules or bundle options, please don't hesitate to ask!

reviews.review_description: It may seem so simple but when in panic mode it can be easy to not know what to do. I've never had a fire but I can see how this could save lives. How about instead of the fire extinguisher right there you have to find it mounted on a wall like in real life

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your incredibly positive feedback and for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. We're thrilled to hear that you see the value in our app and appreciate its potential to help individuals in emergency situations.

Your insight into the immersive nature of the app is invaluable. We love the idea of having the fire extinguisher mounted on the wall, replicating a real-life scenario. This suggestion enhances the authenticity of the training experience and can further prepare users for emergencies. We'll definitely take this feedback into consideration as we continue to refine and improve the user experience.

Once again, we're truly grateful for your kind words and thoughtful suggestion. If you have any further feedback or ideas you'd like to share, please don't hesitate to reach out. Your input is incredibly valuable to us as we strive to provide the best possible training solutions.
